STEP1: Getting PowerPoint
STEP2: PowerPoint found
STEP3: Getting selection
STEP4: Selection type: 2
STEP5: Getting shape
STEP6: Shape name: Decision 1
STEP7: Building data
STEP8: Converting to JSON
STEP9: Outputting JSON
{"name":"Decision 1","type":111,"autoShapeName":"msoShapeFlowchartDecision","left":1,"top":1,"width":2,"height":1.5,"rotation":0,"adjustments":[],"nativePptxRelPath":"native/shape_captured_1700000000003.pptx","fillColor":"#4472C4","fillTransparency":0,"lineColor":"#2E528F","lineWeight":1}
STEP10: Done
